_comment: Add these hooks to your ~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key. If you already have hooks, merge these entries into existing arrays.

SessionStart.description: v7: Initialize state directory for hook communication

PreToolUse.description: v7: Enforce code rules (design-first, caching-last, TypeORM, process.env, financial types)
v7: Safety guardrails (freeze scope lock, destructive op warnings)

PostToolUse.description: v7: Write state files after skill invocations (design phase, Figma)
